notes: 8x8 whitespace canvas for Passage as a casket-only DTC brand in Singapore. Three SKUs (Serene S$499, Tranquil S$999, Eternal S$1,299), all-in transparent pricing including 3-hour island-wide delivery, FSC-certified timber, 30% net profit to charity, free-casket programme. NOT a full funeral platform (no wakes, embalming, livestream, post-death admin, religious rites). Segments are buyer-type ICPs; needs are casket-purchase-decision drivers. Competitors are evaluated on whether they credibly serve a (segment x need) cell — most parlours fail on transparency/all-in/charity/FSC; most wholesale-mfrs fail on direct-to-bereaved-family delivery and grief-sensitive UX.

us_scores_rationale.Casket-cost transparency: Casket cost named line-item across products.html — three SKUs at S$499/S$999/S$1,299 vs typical S$2,000-S$4,000 hidden inside packages.
us_scores_rationale.All-in published pricing: All-in price includes casket + island-wide delivery + venue positioning + GST; no upsell, payment via cash/PayNow/card on delivery.
us_scores_rationale.3-hour island-wide delivery: Standard 3-hour delivery anywhere in SG; surge tiers +S$75 (2hr) and +S$150 (1hr emergency) — no parlour or wholesale mfr publishes this.
us_scores_rationale.FSC-certified + local SG assembly: FSC Chain of Custody certified; 60% timber sourced locally FY2024; <5% material waste; local assembly under PWM.
us_scores_rationale.Audited social-impact (% to charity): 30% of net profits donated quarterly (binding via constitution); FY2024 S$48,200 across SG Hospice Council, SASCO, Metta Welfare.
us_scores_rationale.Free-casket programme: 47 free caskets given FY2024 (31 social-worker referrals + 16 direct family + 8 welfare-org partners); ComCare and no-NOK eligibility.
us_scores_rationale.Tripartite + PWM workforce governance: Triple-signatory on Tripartite Standards (Fair Employment, Flexible Work, Unpaid Leave for Care); Progressive Wage Model compliant; 100% local workforce.
us_scores_rationale.Grief-sensitive UX (24/7 helpline): 24-hour helpline +65 9847 9776 staffed for calm judgment-free intake; serif gold UX tested with bereaved framing.

segments.label: Cost-conscious bereaved
segments.note: Recently bereaved, refusing parlour casket markup

segments.label: Eco / values-driven buyer
segments.note: FSC, local assembly, EV delivery matter

segments.label: Social-impact buyer
segments.note: Buys because 30% to charity is binding, audited

segments.label: Pre-arrangement senior
segments.note: Living senior planning ahead, fixed-price certainty
